Case Study: Automated Hate Speech Detection and Response Bot

Background: Social media platforms are increasingly becoming a breeding ground for hate speech, making it difficult to manage and monitor all the content posted. This has led to the development of automated bots that can detect and respond to hate speech in real-time, reducing the workload on human moderators.

Case Details: A team of researchers from Large Model Systems Organization (LMSYS) created an automated bot that identifies and filters out hate speech from social media platforms. The bot is designed to work on multiple platforms, including Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and Reddit. It uses machine learning algorithms to identify keywords
